name: Fredrinn
intro: Fredrinn, the Rogue Appraiser, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Crystalline Armor
abilities.description: Buff Heal Fredrinn gains 1 Combo Point that lasts 5 seconds each time his skill hits a non-minion enemy, up to 4 Combo Points. His Ultimate costs different numbers of Combo Points at different skill levels. Fredrinn stores 100% of the damage he receives as Crystal Energy , which decays after 5 seconds at a rate of 10% Max HP per second. Fredrinn can convert the stored Crystal Energy into HP by 20% of his damage dealt (10% for damage dealt to minions). Gaining a Combo Point resets the decaying timer.

abilities.name: Piercing Strike
abilities.description: Damage Fredrinn thrusts his sword in the target direction, dealing 125 (+7% Total HP) (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds. His next Basic Attack gains extra attack range and deals 85 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . [ skill duration needed ] This skill deals 200% damage to non-hero enemies.

abilities.name: Brave Assault
abilities.description: Mobility CC Fredrinn dashes in the target direction, dealing 140 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the first non-minion enemy hit. His next Basic Attack knocks the target airborne for 0.3 seconds. [ skill duration needed ]

abilities.name: Energy Eruption
abilities.description: CC AOE Fredrinn deals 210 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and taunts them for 1 second. Hitting a non-minion enemy grants Fredrinn 25 Physical and Magic Defense for 3 seconds and reduces the cooldowns of Piercing Strike and Brave Assault by 75%. This skill costs 1 Combo Point .

abilities.name: Appraiser's Wrath
abilities.description: Burst AOE Fredrinn slams his sword in the target direction (this skill can only be interrupted by Suppression), dealing 600 plus 21%-35% of his Crystal Energy as Physical Damage to enemies in fan-shaped area after a short delay. [ duration needed ] Enemies in the center of the area take 175% [critical] damage. This skill costs 3 Combo Points .
